original_statement: after 2000-01 how many times were they semifinalists in the postseason?
mutated_statement: after 2000-01 how many times did they end up in some late-stage spot in the ensuing period?
mutation_analysis: Specificity reduction + Voice change + Temporal generalization: "semifinalists" (specific playoff round → "some late-stage spot" vague/generalized) | "postseason" (specific competition phase → "ensuing period" broader/ambiguous) | "were they semifinalists" (copular/question) → "did they end up in…" (active/idiomatic) (after 2000-01 how many times were they semifinalists in the postseason? → after 2000-01 how many times did they end up in some late-stage spot in the ensuing period?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从judge_thought中可见代理人并未直接接受原始模糊措辞，而是做出明确假设：文中写到“Interpreting 'late-stage spot' as reaching at least the quarterfinals”和“'After 2000–01' refers to seasons starting from 2001–02 onward”，表明它意识到术语需要解释。代理人据此将“late-stage spot”具体化为至少四分之一决赛并据此逐季统计，最终给出具体数值12。行为特征是识别到歧义并主动设定解释/假设后继续计算并返回确定答案，因此符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”的分类。
